title: Dimension mismatch when inserting with gemini-embedding-001
symptom: When trying to insert embeddings using the gemini-embedding-001 model, n8n throws an error about dimension mismatch, indicating it expected 768 dimensions but received 3072.
root_cause: The Supabase Vector Store node has a hardcoded dimension check that expects embeddings of 768 dimensions, which conflicts with the new gemini-embedding-001 model that outputs 3072 dimensions.
fix_steps: Ensure your Supabase table is configured to accept 3072 dimensions.
Continue using the Supabase Vector Store node for inserting embeddings with gemini-embedding-001.
agent_instruction: Make sure your Supabase table supports 3072 dimensions and use the Supabase Vector Store node for insertion.
